[30;1m27 | [0m[35m### parseurl(req)[0m
[30;1m28 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m29 | [0m[35mParse the URL of the given request object (looks at the `req.url` property)[0m
[30;1m30 | [0m[35mand return the result. The result is the same as `url.parse` in Node.js core.[0m
[30;1m31 | [0m[35mCalling this function multiple times on the same `req` where `req.url` does[0m
[30;1m32 | [0m[35mnot change will return a cached parsed object, rather than parsing again.[0m
